author: Scott Levine
body: Hey, I wanted to see if you can post that whole concert. I tried listening to it on the original site and it skipped a lot.

author: admin
body: Thanks for dropping by Scott…. check your email, I dropped you a line regarding the other tracks.

author: Rich
body:
Thanks so much for posting these. I would really like the rest of the show. These guys are fantastic and I am glad to hear some new stuff from them.

Much appreciated.

Rich

author: David Grinspoon
body:
Hi there – I too am a long time Crows fan who would love to hear this whole set, but can’t get the WXPN/npr site to play correctly. I would be most grateful for help in hearing the rest.

Thanks much!

David

author: matt
body: Hi, any chance of hooking me up with the missing tracks? Thanks so much

author: Scott Levine
body:
Check out this site, you can download it from there:

[http://fuelfriends.blogspot.com/2008/02/counting-crows-on-wxpnworld-cafe-friday.html](http://fuelfriends.blogspot.com/2008/02/counting-crows-on-wxpnworld-cafe-friday.html)

author: Dan
body:
Don’t want to sound greedy, but could you drop ME a line regarding the other tracks?

Thanks. I am a big Crows fan. Looking forward to the new album.

author: admin
body:
Hey Dan,  
Thanks for stopping by! After Scott and I had a problem getting the file to arrive in his email, we came across the online version in the link he mentions above… you might want to check it out :)  
If you have any problems there though, then let me know and we can see if YOUR email might be able to handle it!

author: leah
body: Hey – I caught this show last week on NPR and it was so great to listen to. I would love to get the other tracks if there is any way you could share them. Thanks so much!

author: almart
body: the link dosent seem to work……

author: admin
body:
@ Leah:  
Hey Leah, thanks for stopping by! Regarding the other tracks, I think the easiest is to download the rest of the tracks at the link that Scott mentioned above!  
@ Almart:  
Hi Almart… sorry, which link are you referring to?

author: leah
body: Hey – I actually did try the link Scott suggested and it is no longer active. Any other way you could share the tracks would be greatly appreciated – I am a huge fan :)

author: admin
body:
Hey Leah,  
Yeah, unfortunately as music bloggers, most of us can only keep links valid for a set amount of time. Drop me a line at the email listed in my “About” page, and we can chat…
